title: Deterministic PUBLIC Bootstrap First
description: Fix bootstrap telemetry counters and ensure bootstrap runs BEFORE discovery provider for nonfeed_diagnostic profile

bugs_fixed.description: _pub_bootstrap_fetch_attempted never incremented when bootstrap hits created
bugs_fixed.fix: Added _pub_bootstrap_fetch_attempted += 1 inside bootstrap hit creation loop

bugs_fixed.description: _pub_bootstrap_accepted_findings never updated when bootstrap-sourced findings accepted
bugs_fixed.fix: Added source='bootstrap' check when _pub_accepted > 0 to track bootstrap findings
Added post-aggregate computation of _pub_bootstrap_fetch_success from fetched page results

bugs_fixed.description: public_duplicate_count variable assigned but not used in return block

invariants_verified: Stage derivation prevents DISCOVERY_TIMEOUT when bootstrap accepted > 0
Non-domain queries skip bootstrap (generate_bootstrap_urls returns empty list)
